name: PitchBook
description: A comprehensive data and research platform providing intelligence on private capital markets including venture capital, private equity, and M&A.
notes: PitchBook provides a professional-grade REST API (PitchBook Direct) for enterprise customers; usage is strictly gated and requires an active paid commercial subscription, making it less accessible for hobbyist agent development but highly viable for institutional agent toolkits. [human-verified: Enterprise subscription only. Must contact sales. Agent final pass incorrectly marked buildable=True. Corrected to False.]
